examples: She tripped and fell with a sickening thud.
A sickening consternation struck through him; he recognised his mother!
Everything seemed to wash together in a kind of bland, sickening grayness, and my knees buckled.
The wise men reclined, talked philosophy, and consumed a sickening amount of watered wine.
Then in 1937--38 the economy underwent another sickening slide, with unemployment reaching almost 20%.
